mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff_booking_lock (id, staff_id, booking_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{staffId}, #{staffId}, #{bookingDate}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, staff_id, booking_date, create_time, update_time FROM staff_booking_lock WHERE staff_id = #{staffId} AND booking_date = #{bookingDate} FOR UPDATE
